calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition And Petition To Turn Over Escheated Property
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Petitioner.

Mr. Melbostad presented oral argument to support his position stating that Probate Codes 1351 and 1441 do not apply and that the current figure held by the State Controller's Office is $88,468.86. The Court granted the Petition to Turn Over Escheated Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy K. Saephan. (Not Reported)
